Protocols/ClassNameProtocol.html.name: ClassNameProtocol
Protocols/ClassNameProtocol.html.abstract: Requires the conforming classes to provide a class property and an instance property .className

Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.name: capitalizingFirstLetter()
Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.abstract: Returns a copy of self with 1st letter capitalized

Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.name: camelCaseSplit
Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.abstract: Capitalizes 1st letter and inserts a space before any other capital letter

Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.name: matches(for:)
Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.abstract: Returns an array of substrings in self that matched the regex pattern

Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.name: isBlank()
Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.abstract: Check if self is blank (is empty or consists of whitespace characters only)

Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.name: doesMatch(regex:)
Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.abstract: Returns true if self matches the regex pattern

Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.name: extractDouble()
Extensions/String.html#/s:SS13RudifaUtil.abstract: Return the first number found in self, or nil

Extensions/Optional.html#/s:Sq13RudifaUt.name: increment(by:)
Extensions/Optional.html#/s:Sq13RudifaUt.abstract: Increment an optional Int (also from nil to val)

Extensions/NSAttributedString.html#/s:So.name: init(string:textStyle:)
Extensions/NSAttributedString.html#/s:So.abstract: Initialize from a string using the textStyle

Extensions/NSAttributedString.html#/s:So.name: init(stringsWithStyle:separator:)
Extensions/NSAttributedString.html#/s:So.abstract: Initialize from an array of strings with styles, joining with the separator

Extensions/NSAttributedString.html#/s:So.name: init(from:separator:)
Extensions/NSAttributedString.html#/s:So.abstract: Initialize from an array of NSAttributedString, joining with the separator

Extensions/CaseIterable.html#/s:s12CaseI.abstract: Perform circular increment or decrement of self

Extensions/CaseIterable.html#/s:s12CaseI.name: incremented(next:)
Extensions/CaseIterable.html#/s:s12CaseI.abstract: Perform circular increment or decrement of self and return it

Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.name: fullyOverlaps(with:)
Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.abstract: Returns true if self fully overlaps with interval

Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.name: partiallyOverlaps(with:)
Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.abstract: Returns true if self partially overlaps with interval

Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.name: durationHours
Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.abstract: Return the duration in hours, truncated to the nearest lower integer

Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.name: init(startDate:durationHours:)
Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.abstract: Intitialize from startDate (truncating to the whole hour) and duration

Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.name: twoYearsAround(date:)
Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.abstract: Return a two-year interval around the data

Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.name: isInTheFuture
Extensions/DateInterval.html#/s:10Founda.abstract: Return true if the interval is fully in the future, false otherwise

Extensions/Calendar.html#/s:10Foundation.name: weekdaySymbols_M0
Extensions/Calendar.html#/s:10Foundation.abstract: Returns array of weekday names, starting with Monday

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: MMMM_yyyy
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the local date string like “May 2019”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: ddMMyyyy
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the local date string like “18.08.2019”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: EEEEddMMyyyy
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the local date string including day, like “Sunday 18.08.2019”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: HHmmss
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the local time string like “20:44:23”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: HHmm
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the local time string like “20:44”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: HHmmssSSS
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the local time string with milliseconds, like “12:00:00.000”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: ddMMyyyy_HHmmss_𝜇s
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Return a dateTimeString with microsecond resolution, like “2020-10-25 15:42:05.286747”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: init(seconds:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Initializes self to the date at the specified secondsInto21stCentury

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: ddMMyyyy_HHmmss
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the detailed local date-time string, like “24.07.2019 10:00:00”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: ddMMyyyy_HHmm
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the detailed local date-time string, like “24.07.2019 10:25”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: EEEE_ddMMyyyy_HHmmss
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the detailed local date-time string, like “Wednesday 24.07.2019 10:00:00”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: EEEE_ddMMyyyy_HHmm
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the detailed local date-time string, like “Wednesday 24.07.2019 10:00”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: EEEE_ddMMyyyy_HHmmss_ZZZZZ
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the detailed local date-time string, like “Wednesday 24.07.2019 10:00:00 +02:00”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: timeStamp
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a timestamp (timeIntervalSince1970)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: timeTag
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a timestamp string (timeIntervalSince1970), like “1566153863_69661”

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: increment(by:times:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Increments self by component and value

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: incremented(by:times:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Date incremented by component and value

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: nextMonth()
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Increments self by 1 month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: prevMonth()
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Decrements self by 1 month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: setting(day:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a date with the day of month modified

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: set(day:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Modifies self, setting the day of month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: setting(hour:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a date with the hour modified

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: set(hour:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Modifies self, setting the hour

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: whole(_:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a date where components smaller than calendarComponent are set to 0

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: wholeHour
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a date setting the minute, second all to 0

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: wholeDay
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a date setting the hour, minute, second all to 0

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: wholeMonth
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns a date setting the day to 1, hour, minute, second all to 0

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: month
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns month (1..12)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: month_0
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns month (0..11)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: month1st
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the start date of the month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: monthLast
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the last date of the month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: daysInMonth
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns an array of days. ex. [1, 2, …, 31]

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: year
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns year

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: day
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns day in month (1…)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: day_0
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns day in month (0…)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: weekdayOrdinal
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns weekdayOrdinal (range 1…5, 1 for 1st 7 days of the month, 2 for next 7 days, etc)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: weekday
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns weekday (1…7, 1 is Sunday)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: weekday_0M
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns weekday (0…6, 0 is Monday) of the first day of the month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: month1stWeekday
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns weekday (1…7, 1 is Sunday) of the first day of the month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: month1stWeekday_0M
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns weekday (0…6, 0 is Monday) of the first day of the month

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: isToday
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns true if self is today (any hour)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: hour
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns hour (0..23)

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: dateInterval(of:)
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Returns the date interval of component duration which contains self

Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.name: twoYearsAround
Extensions/Date.html#/s:10Foundation4Dat.abstract: Return the date interval of 2 years around self

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Update array in-place to contain elements of self that are also in other, plus elements from other that are not in self

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Move the element at old index to new index, modifying self in-place

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Move the element at old index to new index

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.name: move(where:to:)
Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Move the element matching the predicate to index, modifying self in-place

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.name: moved(where:to:)
Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Move the element matching the predicate to index

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.name: updatedPreservingOrder(from:)
Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Return array containing elements of self that are also in other, plus elements from other that are not in self

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.name: updatePreservingOrder(from:)
Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Update array in-place to contain elements of self that are also in other, plus elements from other that are not in self

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.name: move(element:to:)
Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Move the element to index, modifying self in-place

Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.name: moved(element:to:)
Extensions/Array.html#/s:Sa13RudifaUtilP.abstract: Move the element matching the predicate to index

Extensions/NSObject.html#/s:So8NSObjectC.name: printClassAndFunc(info:fnc:)
Extensions/NSObject.html#/s:So8NSObjectC.abstract: Print to stdout current class and function names and optional info

Extensions/NSObject.html#/s:So8NSObjectC.name: logClassAndFunc(info:fnc:)
Extensions/NSObject.html#/s:So8NSObjectC.abstract: Print to log file current class and function names and optional info

Extensions/NSObject.html#/s:So8NSObjectC.name: formatClassAndFunc(info:fnc:)
Extensions/NSObject.html#/s:So8NSObjectC.abstract: Return a string containing current class and function names and optional info

Extensions/CaseIterable.html.name: CaseIterable
Extensions/CaseIterable.html.abstract: Extension adds a circular iterator to a CaseIterable item, usually an enum
